## Checklist

- [ ] Scoped to one concern (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated — for any new dictionary/correction entry, both required tests are
      included (exact expected output, and confirmation the fallback engine still works)
- [ ] `npm run docs:tree` run if exported symbols changed (`PROJECT_TREE.md` is current)
- [ ] New ADR added under `docs/adr/` and linked from `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`, if this changes an
      architectural rule (layering, framework, build target, router, state management, styling)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (format-check, lint, typecheck, test, docs-tree check, build)
